title: selaginella orbigniana
intro: Selaginella orbigniana, also known as Resurrection Fern, is a type of evergreen, vascular plant that belongs to the genus Selaginella and is native to the tropical regions of Central and South America. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, and is also known to have antimicrobial and antifungal properties. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to support the immune system and reduce stress levels. In herbal preparations, Selaginella orbigniana is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat a range of conditions, including respiratory problems and digestive issues.
